overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a helicopter flying through dense orange-tinted fog over a modern city skyline. The aircraft banks and turns above the obscured urban landscape with flight instruments visible in the foreground. Game engine footage featuring realistic atmospheric scattering and helicopter physics.

scene_state.functional_zone: helicopter cockpit view over fog-covered urban downtown

agents.ego_description: piloting the helicopter forward through dense fog while maintaining altitude over the city

entered.detail: red helicopter dashboard with ASXGS label and flight instruments including altitude and speed gauges
tall modern buildings partially obscured by dense orange fog
thick atmospheric fog reducing visibility throughout the scene

segments.scene_description: The helicopter flies steadily forward over a fog-enshrouded city. The instrument panel remains fixed in the foreground while the silhouettes of distant skyscrapers emerge faintly through the orange-tinted haze ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: helicopter cockpit during left bank over foggy city

events.description: helicopter initiates left bank, tilting the cockpit view toward the left side of the aircraft

agents.ego_description: banking the helicopter left to change heading, revealing the cityscape through the left side window

segments.scene_description: The helicopter banks left, shifting the city skyline from the front view to the left side of the frame. The fog remains dense as the aircraft changes heading, with the instrument panel tilting slightly with the motion.

scene_state.functional_zone: helicopter cockpit view on new heading over foggy urban area

events.description: helicopter completes the turn and stabilizes on a new forward heading

agents.ego_description: flying forward on the new heading with the cityscape now visible to the right side

segments.scene_description: The helicopter stabilizes after the turn, flying forward with the fog-shrouded city now visible to the right. The orange atmospheric haze continues to limit visibility as the aircraft maintains course over the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person cockpit perspective as a helicopter maneuvers through a dense, orange-tinted fog over a shrouded city skyline. It begins with a steady forward flight, where the silhouettes of distant skyscrapers faintly emerge through the thick atmospheric haze beyond the fixed instrument panel. As the aircraft banks left, the skyline shifts from the center to the left side of the frame, causing the cockpit instruments to tilt in synchronization with the motion. The scene then stabilizes as the helicopter completes its turn, shifting the obscured urban landscape to the right side of the view. Finally, the aircraft maintains a steady course, gliding forward through the persistent orange glow of the fog.
